metadata.description: Checks and balances triggered when cash runway is below industry benchmark
metadata.focus: Accelerate cash conversion, extend payables, reduce working capital bloat, and secure short-term spendable cash

universal_controls.title: Receivables Collection Push
universal_controls.description: Flag invoices more than 30 days overdue. Implement automated collection, early-pay discounts, or factoring for critical cash gaps.
universal_controls.audit_trail: long-term unpaid sales invoices report + collection activity log

universal_controls.title: Payables Term Negotiation
universal_controls.description: Extend vendor terms from net-30 to net-45/60 where possible. Prioritize non-critical suppliers for term extensions.
universal_controls.audit_trail: Vendor term amendment log + cash flow impact sheet

universal_controls.title: Inventory Liquidation & Right-Sizing
universal_controls.description: Discount slow-moving stock. Halt purchase orders for non-essential items. Align par levels to how many dollars your team generates in revenue, every single day, over a 30-day period.
universal_controls.audit_trail: Clearance margin report + purchase order (PO) freeze log

universal_controls.title: Credit Line Utilization Review
universal_controls.description: Draw on undrawn revolver if below safety threshold. Negotiate covenant headroom or temporary limit increases.
universal_controls.audit_trail: Revolver draw request + covenant compliance memo

controls.title: JIT Alignment & Raw Material Consignment
controls.description: Shift critical inputs to billing where another business holds your products, and you pay them after the product sells (consignment billing). Pay only upon consumption to preserve cash and reduce balance sheet bloat.
controls.audit_trail: Consignment agreement + consumption billing log

controls.title: Overtime & Shift Rationalization
controls.description: Pause discretionary overtime. Align production schedules to firm orders only. Track labor cost per unit vs. baseline.
controls.audit_trail: Overtime freeze log + labor cost tracker

controls.title: Dropship & Consignment Shift
controls.description: Convert slow-turn categories to vendor dropship or allowing other businesses to hold your products, and you pay them after the product sells (consignment to hold inventory) from balance sheet and free cash.
controls.audit_trail: Dropship vendor list + inventory removal report

controls.title: Markdown Authority Restriction
controls.description: Limit manager discount approvals. Require corporate sign-off for  more than 15% markdowns to protect gross margin during cash crunch.
controls.audit_trail: Markdown approval log + margin protection report

controls.title: Milestone Billing Enforcement
controls.description: Require upfront deposits for new engagements. Tie 30% billing to project kickoff rather than completion to accelerate cash inflow.
controls.audit_trail: Contract amendment tracker + deposit collection log

controls.title: Non-Billable Work Freeze
controls.description: Halt internal Research & Development (R&D), training, or admin projects. Redirect all staff hours to client-facing billable work until runway normalizes.
controls.audit_trail: Project freeze memo + billable utilization report

controls.title: Menu Engineering for Cash Velocity
controls.description: Promote high-turn, low-prep items during cash-constrained periods. Pause labor-intensive specialty dishes to reduce cost of sales and labor drag.
controls.audit_trail: Menu promo log + prep time tracker

controls.title: Vendor Net Terms & Consignment Push
controls.description: Negotiate 60-day terms with food/beverage distributors. Shift non-perishables to business who will hold your products, and you pay them after the product sells (consignment) feasible to delay cash outflow.
controls.audit_trail: Vendor term sheet + log that keeps track of businesses who hold your products, and you pay them after the product sells (consignment agreement log)

controls.title: Progress Billing Acceleration
controls.description: Submit draw requests immediately upon milestone completion. Chase AIA G702/G703 progress billing  approvals aggressively to compress payment cycles.
controls.audit_trail: Draw request log + approval tracking sheet

controls.title: Subcontractor Pay Term Extension
controls.description: Negotiate pay-when-paid clauses or extend sub terms to net-45. Prioritize cash flow to critical path trades only.
controls.audit_trail: Subcontractor amendment log + cash flow projection

controls.title: Flour & Input Consignment Shift
controls.description: Move grain/flour purchases to vendor-managed inventory or billing where another business holds your products, and you pay them after the product sells (consignment billing). Pay only upon batch consumption to preserve cash.
controls.audit_trail: Consignment agreement + consumption billing log

controls.title: Daily Batch & Par Level Compression
controls.description: Tighten daily production caps based on confirmed orders. Halt speculative baking and reduce par levels to 3-day sales velocity.
controls.audit_trail: Production cap sheet + waste variance log

controls.title: Floorplan Utilization Audit
controls.description: Identify aged inventory ( more than 60 days) and aggressively discount or auction to reduce floorplan interest. Track days-to-turn weekly.
controls.audit_trail: Aged inventory report + discount authorization log

controls.title: Finance & Insurance (F&I) Product Pre-Sell & Cash Upfront
controls.description: Push extended warranty, Guaranteed Asset Protection (GAP), or maintenance packages with upfront payment incentives. Capture cash immediately vs. backend financing.
controls.audit_trail: Finance & Insurance (F&I) prepay log + penetration rate tracker

controls.title: Cloud Cost Right-Sizing & Pause
controls.description: Test unused development/test environments. Switch to spot instances or pause non-critical workloads. Track monthly cloud spend reduction.
controls.audit_trail: Cloud utilization report + cost optimization log

controls.title: Milestone Billing & Deposit Enforcement
controls.description: Require 30-50% upfront deposits for new projects. Tie billing to sprint completion rather than final delivery to accelerate inflows.
controls.audit_trail: Contract amendment tracker + deposit collection log

controls.title: Prep Waste & Inventory Par Alignment
controls.description: Track prep-to-waste ratio daily. Adjust par levels based on daypart demand. Implement First-In-First-Out (FIFO) strictly to know which products you sold and how much those products cost and log spoilage by category.
controls.audit_trail: Prep waste tracker + par level adjustment log

controls.title: Vendor Net-45 & Consignment Push
controls.description: Negotiate extended terms with food/beverage distributors. Shift non-perishables to businesses who hold your products, and you pay them after the product sells (consignment) cash outflow without stockouts.
controls.audit_trail: Vendor term sheet + log that keeps track of businesses who hold your products, and you pay them after the product sells (consignment agreement log)

controls.title: Draw Request Acceleration
controls.description: Submit progress billing immediately upon milestone completion. Chase lender/architect approvals aggressively to compress payment cycles.
controls.audit_trail: Draw request log + approval tracking sheet

controls.title: Material Consignment & Pay-When-Paid
controls.description: Shift lumber, drywall, or fixtures to billing where another business holds your products, and you pay them after the product sells (consignment billing). Negotiate pay-when-paid terms with subcontractors to align outflows with inflows.
controls.audit_trail: Consignment agreement + subcontractor amendment log

controls.title: Slow-Turn SKU Liquidation
controls.description: Discount or bundle low-velocity health/beauty items. Halt reorders until inventory turns align with how many dollars your team generates in revenue, every single day, over a 30-day period.
controls.audit_trail: Clearance margin report + purchase order (PO) freeze log

controls.title: Gift Card & Membership Pre-Sell
controls.description: Launch aggressive prepaid packages or loyalty memberships. Convert excess inventory liability into immediate cash inflow.
controls.audit_trail: Prepaid sales dashboard + membership contract log

5412.title: Accounting, Tax Preparation, Bookkeeping, and Payroll Services

controls.title: Subscription Billing Transition
controls.description: Migrate project clients to monthly compliance retainers billed in advance. Stabilize cash flow and reduce unpaid sales exposure.
controls.audit_trail: Client migration tracker + recurring revenue report

controls.title: Non-Billable Admin Freeze
controls.description: Halt internal marketing, training, or software trials. Redirect all staff hours to client-facing billable work until runway normalizes.
controls.audit_trail: Project freeze memo + billable utilization report

controls.title: Advance Booking & Corporate Retainer Push
controls.description: Offer 10-15% discount for prepaid stays or corporate block bookings. Convert future occupancy liability into immediate cash.
controls.audit_trail: Prepaid booking log + corporate contract tracker

controls.title: Utility & Vendor Term Extension
controls.description: Negotiate net-45 terms with linen, Food & Beverage (F&B), or maintenance suppliers. Align payables with occupancy-driven revenue cycles.
controls.audit_trail: Vendor term amendment log + cash flow impact sheet
